  • Method Details

    • accessPolicy

      public PushMediaSettings.Builder accessPolicy(@Nullable DirectUploadVideoMediaAccessPolicy accessPolicy)
      Determines if access to the streamed content is kept private, drm or available to all.

    • startTime

      public PushMediaSettings.Builder startTime(@Nullable Double startTime)
      Start time indicates where encoding must begin within the video file, in seconds.

    • endTime

      public PushMediaSettings.Builder endTime(@Nullable Double endTime)
      End time indicates where encoding must end within the video file, in seconds.

    • inputs

      public PushMediaSettings.Builder inputs(@Nullable List<Input> inputs)
      Add one input object at a time. For example, first add a **WatermarkInput** object. If you also need a audio, click **Add item** again and select **AudioInput**.

      Repeat this process for **SubtitleInput** as needed.

    • metadata

      public PushMediaSettings.Builder metadata(@Nullable Map<String,String> metadata)
      "Tag a video in "key" : "value" pairs for searchable metadata. Maximum 10 entries, 255 characters each."

    • drmConfigurationId

      public PushMediaSettings.Builder drmConfigurationId(@Nullable String drmConfigurationId)
      UUID of the DRM configuration to be used.

    • title

      public PushMediaSettings.Builder title(@Nullable String title)
      Title of the media file.

    • creatorId

      public PushMediaSettings.Builder creatorId(@Nullable String creatorId)
      The unique identifier of the user who created this media.

    • subtitles

      public PushMediaSettings.Builder subtitles(@Nullable Subtitles subtitles)
      Generates subtitle files for audio/video files.

    • optimizeAudio

      public PushMediaSettings.Builder optimizeAudio(@Nullable Boolean optimizeAudio)
      Enhance the quality and volume of the audio track. This is available for pre-recorded content only.

    • maxResolution

      public PushMediaSettings.Builder maxResolution(@Nullable MaxResolution maxResolution)
      Determines the highest quality resolution available.

    • mediaQuality

      public PushMediaSettings.Builder mediaQuality(@Nullable MediaQuality mediaQuality)
      The quality tier applied to the media.

    • sourceAccess

      public PushMediaSettings.Builder sourceAccess(@Nullable Boolean sourceAccess)
      The sourceAccess parameter determines whether the original media file is accessible. Set to true to enable access or false to restrict it

    • mp4Support

      public PushMediaSettings.Builder mp4Support(@Nullable DirectUploadVideoMediaMp4Support mp4Support)
      Generates MP4 video up to 4K ("capped_4k"), m4a audio only ("audioOnly"), or both for offline viewing.

    • summary

      public PushMediaSettings.Builder summary(@Nullable Summary summary)

    • chapters

      public PushMediaSettings.Builder chapters(@Nullable Boolean chapters)
      Enable or disable the chapters feature for the media. Set to `true` to enable chapters or `false` to disable.

    • namedEntities

      public PushMediaSettings.Builder namedEntities(@Nullable Boolean namedEntities)
      Enable or disable named entity extraction. Set to `true` to enable or `false` to disable.

    • moderation

      public PushMediaSettings.Builder moderation(@Nullable DirectUploadVideoMediaModeration moderation)

    • accessRestrictions

      public PushMediaSettings.Builder accessRestrictions(@Nullable DirectUploadVideoMediaAccessRestrictions accessRestrictions)

    • build

      public PushMediaSettings build()
